activities.details: I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 93.
The Fairy Queen hasn't regained her throne...yet. War must be prepared and troops mustered before the Godfather can sleep with the fishes.
activities.text: Quest complete: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen

activities.details: My travails in Zanaris led me to a fight with a tanglefoot! I finished it off with ease and returned to the Fairy Godfather for my reward.
activities.text: Quest complete: A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains

activities.details: I braved the ghasts of Mort Myre and aided the ghost of Filliman Tarlock to become a nature spirit.
I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 92.
I levelled my Fishing skill, I am now level 91.
I defended Fort Forinthry against an invasion from Zemouregal and Vorkath.
I killed  The Mahjarrat Zemouregal and the resurrected dragon Vorkath.
Completing Haunted Mine has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 160 QP milestone.
Deep beneath Morytania, I dodged pickaxes, puzzled with minecarts and collected fungi. Not only that, but I defeated Treus and collected a salve shard!
I levelled my Fishing skill, I am now level 90.
I led an expedition to the island of Ungael and witnessed Zemouregal reanimating the dragon Vorkath.
The Raptor and I delved deeper into the crypt north of Fort Forinthry and discovered Zemouregal's nefarious plot.
I found the source of undead attacking Fort Forinthry and helped the Raptor setup a defensive front.
I solved the mystery behind Duke Hoarse's murder, and unraveled a plot to assassinate King Roald.
activities.text: Quest complete: Murder on the Border

activities.details: I killed 4 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I now have at least 148000000 experience points in the Agility skill.
After defeating Ivar, King of Bones, I found an Ivar's magic skull mask
activities.text: I found an Ivar's magic skull mask

activities.details: After defeating Ivar, King of Bones, I found an Ivar's bonecrusher maul
activities.text: I found an Ivar's bonecrusher maul

activities.details: I received a vision calling me to the ancient and beautiful land of Havenhythe, and helped the villagers of Wendlewick construct a lodestone.
